name: node-strip-json-comments
title: node-strip-json-comments
summary: Node.js module to strip comments from JSON
description:
Node.js module to strip comments from JSON
This module and command-line client will let you strip comments
from your JSON files.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.

When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-strip-json-comments with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-strip-json-comments --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
